headline: Is Equifax (EFX) A Bargain As New Debt Clouds Its Valuation?
summary: Equifax (EFX) has stepped into the debt markets with a new fixed income offering, issuing fixed rate notes that include senior, subordinated and unsecured tranches, a move that matters for both bondholders and equity investors. See our latest analysis for Equifax. Equifax’s share price has been volatile, with a 1 month share price return of 12.39% but a year to date share price return down 19.17%, while the 1 year total shareholder return is down 26.67% as investors digest guidance,...

headline: These Analysts Slash Their Forecasts On Equifax After Q2 Results
summary: Equifax (EFX) beats Q2 earnings estimates but issues lower Q3 forecasts. Analysts maintain buy ratings with revised price targets.

headline: RBC Capital Maintains Outperform on Equifax, Lowers Price Target to $194
summary: RBC Capital  analyst Ashish Sabadra   maintains Equifax (NYSE:EFX) with a Outperform and lowers the price target from $222 to $194.

headline: Equifax (EFX) Stock May Be Above Fair Value Despite The $750M Credit Bureau Deal
summary: Equifax stock is coming off a share price decline of about 30% over the past 5 years, while the current valuation checks point to a situation that looks neither clearly cheap nor clearly expensive. Over the past 5 years, Equifax has delivered a share price decline of about 30%, which raises questions about how much of the bad news and weaker returns are already reflected in the stock. Recent growth in the core data and analytics businesses, alongside expansion such as the planned acquisition...

headline: Equifax’s AI Savings, Buybacks and Mexico Deal Could Be A Game Changer For Equifax (EFX)
summary: Equifax recently reported its second-quarter 2026 results, with revenue rising to US$1,700.1 million while net income eased slightly year-on-year, and issued third-quarter guidance calling for US$1.68 billion to US$1.71 billion of revenue and earnings of US$2.15 to US$2.25 per share. Alongside these results, Equifax completed a US$1.49 billion share repurchase program and outlined an expanded AI-driven cost reduction plan and a US$750 million acquisition in Mexico, underscoring how it is...
